title: oxyria digyna
intro: Oxyria digyna, also known as mountain sorrel, is a perennial plant species in the family Polygonaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oxyria digyna include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide relief from digestive issues. Oxyria digyna is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal dosage.
